categories.name: A HORSE OF A DIFFERENT COLOR

questions.clue: A nut roasted at Christmastime, or a horse with red as a base color

[IMAGE CLUE]

A sandy or tan horse with all-black points is this type, like a deer hide worn by a frontiersman
